title: TerraCraft: Confluence + Calamity
description: Adds Terraria, Calamity, Fargo's Talismans, and ProjectE to Minecraft 1.21.1
body:
Terracraft: Confluence with Calamity is a bold fusion of Minecraft and Terraria, seamlessly integrating the two together. This modpack transforms the sandbox experience into a high-stakes adventure, featuring:

Terraria-Style Progression – Face formidable bosses, craft legendary gear, and fight the skeletron.

Fargo's Talismans - Get equipped with special gear based on the older Fargo's Souls mod.

Mechanical Synergy – Harness automation with Create, AE2, and ProjectE. Build custom weaponry and armor with goblin tinkerer, and manipulate environments using refined modded mechanics. Clean the overworld of corruption!

Intense Survival Challenges – Adapt to extreme conditions from corruption and crimson biome spreading keeping gameplay fresh and immersive.

LabPBR resourcepacks and Shaders built in

Include Essential Co-Op plugin for easy multiplayer sessions this game is MUCH easier with friends the mob spawns are relentless at night as they are in Terraria.
